name: Parallel Heels
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, heels placed on footbar, feet hip width apart
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep feet dorsiflexed and stable as if standing on floor

name: Parallel Toes
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, toes placed on footbar, feet hip width apart
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Establish plantarflexion when legs are straight
Keep heels stable moving around ankle joint

name: V-Position Toes
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, toes placed on footbar, heels together, small V position
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Establish plantarflexion when legs are straight
Keep heels squeezing together and stable

name: Open V-Position Heels
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, heels placed on outside edge of footbar, wide V position
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep feet dorsiflexed and stable as if standing on the floor

name: Open V-Position Toes
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, toes placed on outside edge of footbar, wide V position
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Establish plantarflexion when legs are straight
Keep heels stable moving around ankle joint

name: Calf Raises
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight and parallel, toes placed on footbar, feet hip width apart and plantarflexed
inhale: Lower heels
exhale: Lift heels, return to start position
cues: Use full range of motion of ankle joint

name: Prances
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight and parallel, toes placed on footbar, feet hip width apart and plantarflexed
inhale: Lower one heel and lift other simultaneously, switch
exhale: Lower one heel and lift other simultaneously, switch; final exhale: lift both heels, return to start position
cues: Work both feet equally in full range of motion
Straighten legs and plantarflex feet completely between each repetition

name: Prehensile
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, toes and balls of feet wrapped around footbar (Prehensile position), feet hip width apart, heels pressing down
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep heels pressing down throughout movement
Maintain wrapped position of toes and balls of feet

name: Single Leg Heel
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, feet hip width apart, heel of one foot placed on footbar, other leg bent at 90 degree angle in hip and knee joints (tabletop position)
exhale: Straighten working leg
inhale: Bend leg, return to start position
cues: Keep foot of working leg dorsiflexed and stable as if standing on floor

name: Single Leg Toes
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, feet hip width apart, toes of one foot placed on footbar, other leg bent at 90 degree angle in hip and knee joints (tabletop position)
exhale: Straighten working leg
inhale: Bend leg, return to start position
cues: Establish plantarflexion when leg is straight

name: Hundred Prep
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs in tabletop position, arms straight and perpendicular to floor, hands in straps, palms facing forward
exhale: Lift head and chest, reach arms down to sides of body, parallel to floor
inhale: Lift arms to 90 degrees in the shoulder joint, lower chest and head, return to start position
cues: Move head together with upper girdle
Maintain straight arms aligned with shoulders
Keep eyeline directly forward when in trunk flexion
Keep tension in straps throughout movement

name: Hundred
setup: Starting in Hundred Prep position
exhale: Lift head and chest, reach arms down to sides of body, parallel to floor, straighten legs forward; pump arms up and down for 5 counts
inhale: Pump arms up and down for 5 counts; final: return to start position
cues: Keep legs stable at safe height

name: Coordination
setup: Starting in Hundred Prep position
exhale: Lift head and chest, reach arms down to sides of body, parallel to floor, straighten legs forward, open legs, close legs
inhale: Bend legs toward chest, lift arms to 90 degrees in the shoulder joint, lower chest and head, return to start position
cues: Keep feet opposite eye line when in trunk flexion
Bend knees toward chest before lifting arms and lowering trunk
Open legs no wider than footbar

name: Round Back
setup: Sitting upright at front of Short Box, knees bent, feet under foot strap, hip width apart, arms crossed and resting on chest
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exhale: Round trunk into C curve, shoulders above hip joints, lift arms parallel to floor, lower trunk back; lift trunk to sitting C curve
inhale: Pause; straighten back and lower arms, return to start position
cues: Initiate with trunk flexion prior to lowering trunk back
Maintain C curve position during lowering and lifting phases
In final phase extend trunk when shoulders are above hip joints

name: Flat Back
setup: Starting in Round Back position, extend spine, hands lightly interlaced behind head
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
inhale: Hinge trunk back
exhale: Hinge trunk forward, return to start position
cues: Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors

name: Tilt
setup: Starting in Flat Back position
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
inhale: Arc trunk to one side
exhale: Lift back to center, return to start position; arc trunk to opposite side
objectives: Spinal lateral flexor control and stretch
cues: Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Keep both sit bones in contact with box as trunk arcs over
Keep elbows wide and head aligned with spine

name: Twist
setup: Starting in Flat Back position
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
inhale: Rotate trunk, lower trunk diagonally back
exhale: Lift trunk to center, rotate to front, return to start position; rotate trunk to opposite side
cues: Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Keep both sit bones in contact with box
Rotate on longitudinal axis prior to hinging diagonally back
Return to longitudinal axis prior to facing front

name: Roundabout
setup: Starting in Flat Back position
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
inhale: Rotate trunk, lower trunk diagonally back
exhale: Rotate to opposite side, lift trunk to center, rotate to front, return to start position
cues: Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Keep both sit bones in contact with box
Rotate on longitudinal axis prior to hinging diagonally back
Return to longitudinal axis prior to facing front

name: Climb-a-Tree
setup: Sitting upright at front of Long Box, one foot under foot strap, other leg bent with thigh to chest, holding leg below knee, hands on shin
resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place
exhale: Pump knee to chest 3 times; round back, walk hands down leg 3 times beginning with outside hand, lifting leg to perpendicular to floor; walk hands up leg 3 times beginning with inside hand
inhale: Straighten leg holding above ankle; arch back over box, circle arms overhead and around, lift head and chest, hold onto leg; straighten spine, bend leg, return to start position
cues: Keep leg perpendicular to floor as arms circle around
Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization as arms circle around

name: Frog
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, dorsiflexed, heels together, hips and knees at 90 degrees
exhale: Straighten legs
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep heels traveling along horizontal line

name: Circles Down
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight, perpendicular to floor, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, plantarflexed
exhale: Lower legs
inhale: Open legs and circle around, lift legs, return to start position
cues: Draw straight line down center, squeezing heels together
Draw two semi-circles back to back as legs circle around

name: Circles Up
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight, perpendicular to floor, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, plantarflexed
exhale: Open legs out to sides, circle legs around and together
inhale: Lift legs, return to start position
cues: Draw straight line up center, squeezing heels together
Draw two semi-circles back to back as legs circle around

name: Openings
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs straight on diagonal line (45 to 60 degrees), hips externally rotated, feet in straps, plantarflexed
inhale: Open legs
exhale: Close legs, return to start position
cues: Keep feet moving at consistent height from floor as legs open and close
Move within the limits of pelvic lumbar control

name: Frog Extended
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, feet in straps, dorsiflexed, heels together, hips and knees at 80 degrees
exhale: Straighten legs; bend legs, bring heels together, return to start position
inhale: Open legs; pause
cues: Keep heels squeezing together as legs straighten
Keep carriage still as legs bend in from open position

name: Frog Extended Reverse
setup: Starting in Frog Extended position
exhale: Straighten legs out to sides; close legs
inhale: Pause; bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep heels squeezing together as legs bend
Keep carriage still as legs open out to sides

name: Bottom Lift
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, feet hip width apart, toes placed on footbar, knees bent, arms by sides, headrest down
exhale: Roll spine up; roll spine down
inhale: Pause; pause
cues: Feet position is same as Parallel Toes in Footwork
Keep heels still, adductors engaged and legs parallel
Minimize movement of carriage when rolling spine up and down
Articulate through each vertebra as spine rolls up and down

name: Bottom Lift with Extension
setup: Starting in Bottom Lift position
exhale: Roll spine up; straighten legs (not completely); roll spine down, return to start position
inhale: Pause; bend legs
cues: Feet position is same as Parallel Toes in Footwork
Keep heels still, adductors engaged and legs parallel

name: Short Spine
setup: Starting in Frog Extended position, headrest down
exhale: Straighten legs, plantarflex feet; roll up onto shoulders; articulate spine down, keep feet over eyes
inhale: Bring legs overhead keeping pelvis stable; bend knees to Frog position; dorsiflex feet, roll sacrum down to mat, move legs forward, return to start position
cues: Bring carriage all the way to stopper before rolling up
Keep tension in straps when rolling up onto shoulders
Keep thighs parallel to floor and back extensors engaged when in overhead Frog position

name: Long Spine
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, hips externally rotated, legs straight on diagonal line (45 to 60 degrees), feet in straps, plantarflexed, headrest down
inhale: Lift legs perpendicular to floor; open legs shoulder width apart
exhale: Roll up onto shoulder girdle; roll down to sacrum, lower and close legs, return to start position
cues: Use hamstrings concentrically rolling up, eccentrically rolling down
Anchor pelvis prior to roll up and following roll down
Keep carriage still during roll up and roll down

name: Lunge Standing
setup: Standing, front leg bent in line with footbar, knee over ankle, knee of other leg placed on carriage, foot against shoulder rest, arms straight, hands placed on footbar, inside hand in line with shoulder
inhale: Stretch hip flexors of leg on carriage (3-5 breaths); bend front leg, return to start position
exhale: Dorsiflex foot on floor, straighten leg and lower trunk forward (3-5 breaths)
cues: Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis during hip flexor stretch
Bias toward anterior tilt of pelvis during hamstring stretch
Move pelvis along horizontal line when straightening and bending front leg

name: Lunge Kneeling
setup: Kneeling on carriage, one foot on footbar, knee over ankle, other foot against shoulder rest, knee on carriage, arms straight, hands placed on footbar, shoulder width apart
inhale: Stretch hip flexors of leg on carriage (3-5 breaths); bend leg, return to start position
exhale: Straighten front leg, lower trunk forward (3-5 breaths)
cues: Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis during hip flexor stretch
Bias toward anterior tilt of pelvis during hamstring stretch
Move pelvis along horizontal line when straightening and bending front leg
Maintain spinal extensor engagement during hamstring stretch

name: Lunge Forward
setup: Standing on carriage, place one foot against shoulder rest, kneel on carriage, place front foot on footbar, straighten back leg lifting knee off the carriage and pressing heel into shoulder rest, keep front knee over ankle
inhale: Stretch hip flexors of back leg (3-5 breaths); bend front leg, return to start position
exhale: Straighten front leg, lower trunk forward (3-5 breaths)
cues: Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis during hip flexor stretch
Bias toward anterior tilt of pelvis during hamstring stretch
Move pelvis along horizontal line when straightening and bending front leg
Maintain spinal extensor engagement during hamstring stretch

name: Scooter Round Back
setup: Standing, one foot on floor, leg bent, other foot against shoulder rest, leg bent, heel of foot on floor lined up with other foot, arms straight, hands placed on footbar, inside hand in line with shoulder, trunk in C curve position
inhale: Straighten leg against shoulder rest (not completely)
exhale: Bend leg, return to start position
cues: Keep standing leg bent and stable

name: Scooter Flat Back
setup: Standing, one foot on floor, leg bent, other foot against shoulder rest, leg bent, heel of foot on floor lined up with other foot, arms straight, hands placed on footbar, inside hand in line with shoulder, trunk in neutral spine position
inhale: Straighten leg against shoulder rest (not completely)
exhale: Bend leg, return to start position
cues: Keep standing leg bent and stable

name: Knee Stretch Round Back
setup: Kneeling on carriage with sit bones toward heels, feet against shoulder rests, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on footbar, round trunk into C curve position
inhale: Move legs back
exhale: Move legs forward, return to start position

name: Knee Stretch Flat Back
setup: Kneeling on carriage with sit bones toward heels, feet against shoulder rests, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on footbar, trunk in neutral spine position
inhale: Move legs back
exhale: Move legs forward, return to start position

name: Up Stretch 1
setup: Standing on carriage, legs straight, heels against shoulder rests, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on footbar, head between arms, pelvis lifted toward ceiling, back flat
inhale: Move legs back
exhale: Move legs forward, return to start position

name: Elephant
setup: Starting in Up Stretch 1 position, feet flat on carriage, heels against shoulder rests
inhale: Move legs back
exhale: Move legs forward, return to start position

name: Knee Stretch Reverse
setup: Kneeling on carriage, quadruped position, knees slightly away from shoulder rests, arms straight, hands placed on F2 handles (or rails), shoulders slightly forward of hands, trunk in C curve position
exhale: Move legs forward
inhale: Move legs back, return to start position
cues: Engage shoulder extensors as knees move forward

name: Down Stretch
setup: Kneeling on carriage, feet against shoulder rest, arms straight, shoulder width apart, hands placed on footbar, body in arc shape
exhale: Move body down and back
inhale: Move body up and forward, return to start position
cues: Keep abdominals engaged to avoid pressure on lumbar spine
Keep heels pressing against shoulder rests
Bias toward posterior tilt of pelvis
Maintain consistent arc shape with body
Begin and end movement with carriage against stopper

name: Stomach Massage Round Back
setup: Sitting on carriage, legs bent, toes placed on footbar, feet in V position, hands placed on front edge of carriage, trunk in C curve position
exhale: Straighten legs, dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Press hands against front of carriage
Straighten legs completely prior to dorsiflexion and plantarflexion

name: Stomach Massage Flat Back
setup: Starting in Stomach Massage Round Back position, arms bent, hands on shoulder rests, fingers facing away from body, back straight
exhale: Straighten legs, dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep elbows slightly bent and reaching back
Maintain scapular stabilization (as close as possible)
Straighten legs completely prior to dorsiflexion and plantarflexion

name: Stomach Massage Reaching
setup: Starting in Stomach Massage Flat Back position, back straight, arms straight, reaching up and forward, V position, palms facing down
exhale: Straighten legs, dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet
inhale: Bend legs, return to start position
cues: Keep arms on consistent diagonal line
Straighten legs completely prior to dorsiflexion and plantarflexion

name: Up Stretch 2
setup: Starting in Up Stretch 1 position
inhale: Lower pelvis into Front Support position
exhale: Lift pelvis, return to start position
cues: Pivot around hip joints and shoulder joints

name: Long Stretch
setup: Starting in Front Support position, heels against shoulder rests
inhale: Move body forward
exhale: Move body back, return to start position
cues: Bias toward slight posterior tilt of pelvis
Move carriage forward until shoulders are over footbar

name: Extension
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs in tabletop position, arms straight and perpendicular to floor, hands in straps, palms facing forward
exhale: Lower arms to sides of body
inhale: Lift arms, return to start position

name: Adduction
setup: Starting in Extension position with arms out to sides in T position, hands in straps, palms facing body
exhale: Move arms to sides of body
inhale: Move arms away from body, return to start position
cues: Move arms along horizontal line, parallel to floor

name: Circles Up
setup: Starting in Adduction position
exhale: Move arms to sides of body, rotate arms, palms facing down
inhale: Lift arms perpendicular to floor, move arms out to sides, return to start position
cues: Reach each point of the circle

name: Circles Down
setup: Starting in Extension position
exhale: Lower arms to sides of body, rotate arms, palms face body
inhale: Open arms to T position, lift arms perpendicular to floor, return to start position

name: Triceps
setup: Starting in Extension position, hands in straps, arms straight by sides of body, palms facing carriage
inhale: Bend arms
exhale: Straighten arms, return to start position
cues: Keep elbows pressing against sides of body
Keep upper arms parallel to floor and in line with shoulders

name: Chest Expansion
setup: Sitting upright at front edge of carriage, facing risers, legs straight between shoulder rests, arms straight and forward of trunk, hands in straps, palms facing back
exhale: Move arms back
inhale: Move arms forward, return to start position
cues: Move arms 20 degrees forward and 20 degrees back of trunk

name: Biceps
setup: Starting in Chest Expansion position, arms straight and forward, shoulder height, palms facing up
exhale: Bend arms
inhale: Straighten arms, return to start position
cues: Keep upper arms at shoulder height, parallel to floor
Straighten elbows completely following each repetition

name: Rhomboids 1
setup: Starting in Biceps position, arms bent at 90 degrees and parallel to each other, shoulder height, forearms in straps, palms facing body
exhale: Move arms out to sides
inhale: Move arms forward, return to start position
cues: Move upper arms parallel to floor
Maintain consistent position of arms with palms facing body

name: Rhomboids 2
setup: Starting in Rhomboids 1 position
exhale: Move arms out to sides, glide scapulae together
inhale: Glide scapulae apart, move arms forward, return to start position
cues: Move upper arms parallel to floor
Maintain consistent position of arms with palms facing body
Continue moving arms back as scapulae adduct

name: Hug-a-Tree
setup: Sitting upright facing footbar, legs straight and together, pelvis against shoulder rests, arms in T position, micro-bend in elbows, hands in straps, palms facing forward
exhale: Move arms forward
inhale: Move arms back, return to start position
cues: Move arms along horizontal line at shoulder height, parallel to floor
Move arms forward until parallel with each other

name: Salute
setup: Starting in Hug-a-Tree position, arms bent, hands in straps in line with eyes, fingers facing forward
exhale: Straighten arms forward and up on diagonal line
inhale: Bend arms, return to start position
cues: Keep elbows lifted and reaching outward
Keep fingers pointing in direction of movement

name: Chest Expansion
setup: Kneeling in upright position on carriage, knees against shoulder rests, arms straight and forward of trunk, hands holding folded straps, palms facing body
exhale: Move arms back
inhale: Move arms forward, return to start position
cues: Bias towards posterior tilt of pelvis
Move arms 20 degrees forward and 20 degrees back of trunk

name: Circles Up
setup: Kneeling in upright position on carriage, facing footbar, feet against shoulder rests, arms straight by sides of body, hands in straps, palms facing forward
exhale: Lift arms forward and up, rotate arms, palms face forward
inhale: Circle arms out to T position, lower arms to sides of body, return to start position
cues: Bias towards posterior tilt of pelvis
Keep arms in peripheral vision when circling around
Reach overhead position prior to rotating arms

name: Circles Down
setup: Starting in Circles Up position
exhale: Lift arms out to sides and up, rotate arms, palms face up
inhale: Lower arms down in front of body, return to start position
cues: Bias towards posterior tilt of pelvis
Keep arms in peripheral vision when circling around
Reach overhead position prior to rotating arms

name: Triceps
setup: Starting in Circles Up position, arms bent, elbows facing outward, hands in straps, behind head, forming triangle with thumbs and index fingers
exhale: Straighten arms
inhale: Bend arms, return to start position
cues: Keep elbows reaching out to sides

name: Biceps
setup: Starting in Circles Up position, arms straight and back of trunk, parallel to each other (as close as possible), hands holding straps
exhale: Bend arms
inhale: Straighten arms, return to start position
cues: Maintain trunk stabilization, avoiding ribs flaring
Keep upper arms and elbows stable
Maintain neutral position of scapulae (as close as possible)

name: Mermaid
setup: Sitting sideways on carriage, one leg bent against shoulder rests, other leg bent in front of body, arms straight, one hand placed on footbar in line with shoulder, other arm down by side
inhale: Push carriage out, lower body until arm is parallel with floor, simultaneously lift other arm to diagonal line; rotate trunk back to previous position
exhale: Rotate trunk, bring arm around to footbar; bring carriage in, return to start position
objectives: Spinal lateral flexor and rotator control
cues: Pivot around supporting shoulder during rotation

name: Breaststroke Prep 1
setup: Lying prone on Long Box, neutral spine position, legs straight and together, parallel to floor, feet plantarflexed, arms bent, elbows facing outward, hands on footbar
inhale: Straighten arms
exhale: Bend arms, return to start position
cues: Maintain back and hip extensor engagement
Keep wrists firm and fingers wrapped around footbar
Face elbows outward as if arms are on flat surface

name: Breaststroke Prep 2
setup: Starting in Breaststroke Prep 1 position
inhale: Straighten arms, simultaneously lifting trunk
exhale: Bend arms, lowering trunk, return to start position
cues: Keep wrists firm and fingers wrapped around footbar
Articulate spine into extension starting from crown of head
Face elbows outward as if arms are on flat surface

name: Breaststroke
setup: Starting in Breaststroke Prep 1 position, elbows bent by sides of body, thumbs in straps, hands in line with shoulders
inhale: Lift trunk, straighten arms forward, circle arms around to sides of body
exhale: Bend arms, lower trunk, return to start position
cues: Maintain external rotation of shoulders as body is lowered and elbows bend during final phase of movement

name: Pulling Straps 1
setup: Lying prone on Long Box, neutral spine position, legs straight and together, parallel to floor, feet plantarflexed toward footbar, arms straight, forward of shoulders, hands holding folded straps, palms facing each other
inhale: Lift trunk, move arms back to sides of body
exhale: Lower trunk, move arms forward, return to start position
cues: Articulate spine into extension starting from crown of head
Bring arms forward of shoulder line no more than 20 degrees

name: Pulling Straps 2
setup: Starting in Pulling Straps 1 position, arms in T position, parallel to floor, hands through the straps, palms facing down
inhale: Lift trunk, move arms to sides of body
exhale: Lower trunk, move arms to T position, return to start position
cues: Move arms on horizontal line, parallel to floor
Emphasize mid and upper back extensors
